title: Zooming in with the scroll wheel — high-detail tile stream
capture_instructions: Queens Campus point cloud zoomed into a specific area at ground level or near a building. The zoomed view should show fine detail (individual points, kerb edges, road surface). Higher-resolution tiles should be visible from the stream. Compare with a small inset or annotation showing the overview level. Status bar should show a higher point count due to higher-detail tile loading.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active, zoomed into a specific area of the Queens Campus (e.g. a building or road), high-detail view

annotations.label: High-detail points visible after zooming in
Scroll toward this area to zoom in
Status bar — higher point count after zoom
